UW-51  RADIOGRAPHIC EXAMINATION — METHODS AND ACCEPTANCE. (a) Radiographic examination required by UW-11 shall be performed in accordance with the methods described in this paragraph. (b) Film quality shall meet the requirements of this paragraph. Image quality indicators (IQIs) shall be placed as specified herein. (c) Acceptance criteria: welds shall be free of cracks, incomplete fusion, and incomplete penetration. Porosity and slag inclusions shall not exceed the limits of this paragraph. For spot radiography acceptance, see UW-52. Welders whose welds fail examination shall be requalified per QW-301. Refer to UG-93 for Inspector involvement.
